_meta.note: This data is SYNTHETIC and modeled, not real. Generated for the Velocity engine demo to illustrate lead intake and BANT-style prioritization.

models_company.name: Cadence Workflow
models_company.description: Fictional B2B SaaS selling project-management software to mid-market teams on a monthly per-seat subscription.
models_company.stage: ~120 employees, Series B, under pressure to grow new revenue.
models_company.go_to_market: Inbound handled by 3 SDRs feeding 4 Account Executives.

calibration_targets.created_at_window: Most recent calendar month (June 2026); deliberately includes evenings and weekends.

field_schema.contact_role: junior | manager | director | vp | c_level | owner
field_schema.as_is_first_response_minutes: int minutes, or null if never contacted

_meta.disclaimer: No real persons, companies, or contact details are represented. Cadence Workflow is fictional.
